name: Cenovus Energy Inc.
description: Cenovus Energy Inc. is an integrated energy company headquartered in Calgary, Canada. The company is focused on managing its assets safely and sustainably while delivering strong financial performance. Cenovus's operations include oil sands projects in northern Alberta, thermal and conventional crude oil and natural gas production in Western Canada, production offshore Newfoundland and Labrador, and refining and marketing operations in Canada and the United States.
